questionHtml: The infrared spectrum of the compound is shown. Deduce the functional group of the compound.
markschemeHtml:
«absorption at wavenumber 1700−1750 cm–1» C=O/carbonyl ✔

 

Do not accept “ketone” or “aldehyde”.
